title: Senior Full Stack Engineer (Vue / Laravel)
description:
Senior Full-Stack Engineer

We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer to join our team in building, operating, and supporting highly reliable production systems. This role is hands-on and requires strong ownership across development, operations support, and system stability.

  • Working Hours: Mon-Fri
  • Working Location: North-East
  • Job Type: Contract
  • Salary Package: Up to $9,800 (basic) + AWS

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain full-stack applications for live production systems, with a strong focus on reliability, performance, and stability.

  • Build and enhance secure, scalable, and resilient frontend and backend services.

  • Provide Level 3 (L3) application support, including incident investigation, root-cause analysis, and implementation of permanent fixes.

  • Collaborate closely with DevOps, Security, and QA teams to resolve application and security issues within defined SLAs.

  • Support release management and change validation, including impact assessment, rollback planning, and post-release verification.

  • Develop and maintain operational artefacts such as runbooks, dashboards, health checks, and troubleshooting guides.

  • Monitor and analyse application and operational metrics, proactively identifying performance bottlenecks and areas for improvement.

  • Communicate clearly during incidents, releases, and system changes, ensuring transparency with stakeholders.

  • Apply security, reliability, and observability best practices when designing and enhancing system components.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent) in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

  • 5+ years of experience as a Full-Stack Engineer supporting production systems.

  • Strong hands-on experience with Vue.js, Laravel, and Golang.

  • Solid understanding of frontend frameworks, RESTful APIs, and modern application architectures.

  • Experience with containerised applications (Docker required; Kubernetes or ECS exposure preferred).

  • Proven experience in L3 support, incident debugging, and root-cause analysis for live environments.

  • Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to prioritise effectively under pressure.

  • Good communication skills and a collaborative mindset.

Nice to Have

  • Experience operating applications on AWS.

  • Experience working with CI/CD pipelines and production deployment workflows.

  • Exposure to regulated or large-scale enterprise environments.

By submitting your resume, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal information per ScienTec’s Privacy Policy (scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

This authorizes us to:

Contact you about potential opportunities.

Delete personal data as it is not required at this application stage.

All applications will be processed with strict confidence. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Elane Yap Theng Yu- R1989397

ScienTec Consulting Pte Ltd - 11C5781

postedCompany.description:
An award-winning company founded in 2004, ScienTec has transformed organizations across Asia Pacific with our 4 principal services: Staffing, Specialist Search, Outsourcing and HR Consulting.

Our "People First, Always" core value underpins our mission to redefine the standards of HR services and deliver you top-tier candidate support, as reflected in our attainment of key accolades such as Recruitment Agency of the Year, Best Client Service, and Best Candidate Experience.


Our sector and functional coverage include ICT/technology, industrial engineering, and corporate services recruitment.


By submitting your resume, you give your express consent that ScienTec Consulting may use your personal information to process your job application and to contact you from time to time for future employment opportunities.

For further information on how ScienTec Consulting processes your personal information and how to access and correct your information, please read the ScienTec Consulting’s Privacy Policy (https://www.scientecconsulting.com/privacy-policy).

Please do not submit any sensitive personal data to us in your resume (such as government ID numbers, ethnicity, gender, religion, marital status) as we do not collect your personal data at this time.


All job applications will be processed with strict confidence and only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
